error_message: undefined method `whatsapp_conversation' for nil:NilClass
solution:
1. Ensure the recipient mobile number is provided in the API request.

2. Validate that the mobile field is not empty before calling whatsapp_conversation.

3.Test the request with a valid mobile number before sending.

error_title: Undefined method each for String or NilClass
error_message:
undefined method each' for "ABC Auto Services - Bangalore Whitefield Road":String
undefined method each' for nil:NilClass
root_cause:
Parameters expected as an array,
 but a String or nil was sent in the template text field
solution:
1. Ensure that all template parameters are arrays, even if there is only 1 value.

2. Instead of sending "text": "ABC Auto Services - Bangalore Whitefield Road", send "text": ["ABC Auto Services - Bangalore Whitefield Road"].

3. Check that no parameter is nil before sending the request.

4. Validate all components in the payload to match the approved template placeholders.

5. Test the API call locally with proper array format before sending.

error_message:
Mysql2::Error: Duplicate entry '9999999999-john.doe@example.com
' for key 'advocates_mobile_email_index'
root_cause: Attempted to insert a record with the same mobile + email combination that already exists in client_company_contacts table
solution:
1. Check if a record with the same mobile and email already exists in the client_company_contacts table.

2. Avoid inserting duplicates by validating mobile + email before insert.

3. If using Rails, consider find_or_create_by(mobile: ..., email: ...) instead of direct insert.

4. If duplicates are allowed, decide whether to update the existing record instead of creating a new one.

5. Test insertion locally before running production scripts.

| mobile | email | Allowed?                              |
| ------ | ----- | ------------------------------------- |
| A      | B     | ?                                     |
| A      | C     | ?                                     |
| D      | B     | ?                                     |
| A      | B     | ? NOT allowed (duplicate combination) |

error_message: body: number of localizable_params (4) does not match the expected number of params (5)
root_cause: The number of placeholders defined in the approved WhatsApp template does not match the number of parameters sent in the API request.
solution:
1. Check the approved WhatsApp template to see how many placeholders ({{1}}, {{2}}, …) are defined.

2. Ensure the API request sends exactly the same number of values in the "text" array for the body component.

3. Update your API request with the correct number of parameters.

4. Test the request locally before sending.

error_title: Template Name Cannot Be Empty or Invalid
error_message: The API cannot find the template you are trying to send.
root_cause: The template either does not exist, is not approved, or the name does not match exactly with the approved WhatsApp template.
solution:
1. Verify that the template exists in your WhatsApp Business account.

2. Ensure the template is approved.

3. Check that the template name in the API request matches exactly (case-sensitive and including spaces).

4. Test the request locally before sending.

error_title: Parameter of Type Text is Missing Text Value
root_cause: The "text" field in the API request is either missing, null, empty, or undefined.
solution:
1. Ensure the "text" field is included in the request.

2. Provide a valid string value for "text".

3. Validate that the "text" value is not empty or null before sending the API request.

4. Test the request locally to confirm it passes.

error_title: Param Text Cannot Have New-line/Tab Characters or More Than 4 Consecutive Spaces
error_message:
The value you are passing inside a template text parameter contains invalid characters.
Examples of invalid content:
1?? A new line character (\n)
2?? A tab character (\t)
3?? More than 4 continuous spaces ( )
WhatsApp does not allow these inside template variable values.
root_cause: The template text parameter includes formatting characters or spacing that WhatsApp does not support, such as new lines, tabs, or excessive spaces.
solution:
1. Remove any new line (\n) or tab (\t) characters from the text parameter.

2. Ensure that no segment of the text contains more than 4 consecutive spaces.

3. Replace invalid characters with acceptable whitespace or formatting.

4. Test the template locally to confirm it meets WhatsApp formatting rules.

error_message:
The parameter in the API request is invalid.
Examples:
• ? Invalid phone number (91null)
• ? Text value is an empty array instead of a string
root_cause: The API request contains parameters that do not meet the required format or type. For example, phone numbers may be missing or incorrectly formatted, or text fields may not be strings.
solution:
1. Verify that all phone numbers are valid and include the correct country code.

2. Ensure text parameters are strings and not arrays or other types.

3. Validate all parameters in your code before sending the request

4. Test the request locally to ensure all parameters meet WhatsApp API requirements.

error_message: This message was not delivered due to WhatsApp’s engagement policies.
root_cause: The user’s interaction levels are low, or messaging frequency is high, triggering WhatsApp’s engagement restrictions.
solution:
1. Reduce the frequency of messages sent to the user.

2. Encourage user interactions (replies, clicks) to improve engagement.

3. Monitor WhatsApp engagement metrics to avoid policy triggers.

4. Test messaging to active users to confirm delivery.

error_message: The message may be undeliverable because the recipient cannot receive it on WhatsApp.
root_cause:
The recipient cannot receive messages due to one or more of the following:

• Invalid or incorrectly formatted phone number

• User is not on WhatsApp

• User blocked the business number

• User deleted their WhatsApp account

• Platform engagement restrictions applied

• Temporary network or device issue on the user’s side
solution:
1. Verify the recipient’s phone number format and validity.

2. Confirm the user is registered on WhatsApp.

3. Check if the user has blocked the business number.

4. Consider temporary network/device issues and retry later.

5. Monitor platform engagement restrictions and adjust messaging frequency accordingly.

6. Test delivery with a valid and active WhatsApp number to confirm resolution.

error_message: Business tier limit reached
root_cause: Exceeded monthly messaging limit
solution: 1. Upgrade tier or wait until quota resets

error_message: Exceeded API limits
root_cause: Rate limits exceeded
solution:
1. Respect WhatsApp rate limits. 

2. Implement queue.

error_message: Request timed out
root_cause: Request exceeded server timeout
solution:
1. Retry request. 

2. Reduce payload size if large.

error_message: Backend issue or template sync problem
root_cause: Temporary server failure or template sync issue
solution:
1. Retry after few minutes. 

2. Check template sync.

error_message: Sending text when template expects URL/button/media
root_cause: Mismatched component type
solution: 1. Match template components exactly.

error_message: Number format not correct
root_cause: Phone number format incorrect
solution: 1. Use full number with country code: 91XXXXXXXXXX (no +, no spaces)

error_message: Trying to send unsupported type
root_cause: Sending unsupported message type for template
solution: 1. Use template type for templates, text type for text messages.

error_message: JSON invalid or missing fields
root_cause: Payload malformed or missing required keys
solution:
1. Validate JSON.

 2. Check type, template, text, etc.

error_message: Template requires button or media but not provided
root_cause: Missing required template components
solution: 1. Provide correct button/media object in JSON.

error_message: Number of parameters sent does not match template
root_cause: Wrong number of dynamic components provided
solution:
1. Check template components and parameters. 

2. Send exact count.

error_message: Template is still pending or rejected
root_cause: Template not approved yet
solution: Template to be approved

error_message: Template does not exist in requested language
root_cause: Language mismatch, wrong WABA, or template not synced to number
solution:
1. Check template language. 

2. Ensure template synced to number.

error_message: Recipient not approved for sandbox messaging
root_cause: Number not added to sandbox or allowed recipients
solution: Add number to allowed recipients list.

error_message: Phone number is disconnected from Hub
root_cause: Number was removed or inactive
solution: 1. Reconnect number in Hub.

error_message: API key does not match the phone number or number not active
root_cause: Phone number not linked to API key, or number inactive
solution:
1. Check number status. 

2. Use correct API key.

error_message: API key doesn’t have permission to send messages
root_cause: API key lacks required permissions or number not linked
solution:
1. Ensure API key is linked to number. 

2. Confirm number is Active.
